3015233.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
3015233.transcript: It's like I blink and the enemy's already a pincushion!

5838371.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
5838371.transcript: Oops. Lost control there for a bit.

6586684.label: PL2800_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_3
6586684.transcript: We've still got a fight to win!

13128542.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
13128542.transcript: Hang in there, guys! We've got this!

13508703.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
13508703.transcript: Your form's not bad either. I saw you swing from the hip.

18993090.label: PL2800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C
18993090.transcript: Hope I didn't worry you too much.

19908827.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
19908827.transcript: No rest for the wicked... or the spiritual.

26279265.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
26279265.transcript: Hey, Seofon. Anyone ever tell you you're kinda cool?

28750119.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
28750119.transcript: If there's one thing I can do, it's kick ass.

33836638.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
33836638.transcript: More like a summer inferno. I better catch up.

44075331.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
44075331.transcript: I'm more than just a pretty face.

50534047.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
50534047.transcript: I knew it would work out.

60346828.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
60346828.transcript: Makes me dark and mysterious, right?

62165612.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
62165612.transcript: Seeing the Fist of the Red Lotus, I'm speechless.

62950129.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
62950129.transcript: We've got more where that came from!

76202595.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
76202595.transcript: Ah, so you need your ass beat before you'll listen.

92891541.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
92891541.transcript: Stay sharp! We can't back down yet!

103716137.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
103716137.transcript: Am I glad to have your help?

105152693.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
105152693.transcript: Oh! I love a good fight!

105843780.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
105843780.transcript: Your roses are beautiful. Shame they fade so quickly.

107495209.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
107495209.transcript: Can't help but feel kinda bad for our foes.

109776918.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
109776918.transcript: Keep it cool, and keep winning.

111208182.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
111208182.transcript: You're no slouch yourself. Wanna spar sometime?

119358579.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
119358579.transcript: Hey Zeta, you ready to go again?

127169519.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
127169519.transcript: Hey, we make a pretty good team, don't you think?

130481668.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
130481668.transcript: So, I may not look the part, but I want nothing more than to protect this crew.

133578161.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
133578161.transcript: The Vaseraga seal of approval. I'm honored.

135544459.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
135544459.transcript: It's hard work to keep all that power contained, huh?

141233023.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
141233023.transcript: We had beautiful teamwork on that one!

142087890.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
142087890.transcript: Come on! It's all or nothing!

143259491.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
143259491.transcript: A magician never reveals her secrets.

153324998.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
153324998.transcript: Oh yeah! It doesn't get better than that!

155992303.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
155992303.transcript: We had perfect sync on that one!

162198439.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
162198439.transcript: Can't believe these guys would mess up such a beautiful castle.

163170794.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
163170794.transcript: Aw, do you want some pointers?

174100987.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
174100987.transcript: You act all cool, but underneath the mask, you're a firebrand.

176070894.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
176070894.transcript: Time for a little target practice!

184932879.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
184932879.transcript: You will be consumed by fire!

192243228.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
192243228.transcript: We've got him on the ropes!

201618905.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
201618905.transcript: Leave the front lines to moi.

201701152.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
201701152.transcript: We can do this all day!

202974612.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
202974612.transcript: Huh. Maybe I should get a tagline too.

205105772.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
205105772.transcript: You ready? Let's have some fun.

207336042.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
207336042.transcript: I make a pretty dependable partner, don't you think?

210999717.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
210999717.transcript: We'll see you at the bottom of the skies!

223271759.label: PL2800_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
223271759.transcript: Oh hellborn flames, I bid you!

224842683.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
224842683.transcript: Go ahead, get in our way. See what that gets you.

228720532.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
228720532.transcript: A compliment from the Lord of Flames himself? I'm honored.

234852399.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
234852399.transcript: We've already come this far. There's nothing left to fear.

239704711.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
239704711.transcript: Don't worry, everyone. I've got your back.

242309193.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
242309193.transcript: Alright! You got more juice left?

244294874.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
244294874.transcript: Shasha, you make fighting a breeze!

246578036.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
246578036.transcript: I'll cash in a favor later.

256283274.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
256283274.transcript: I've seen puppies with more bite!

256427303.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
256427303.transcript: Right! Now come on! We've got a fight to win!

258210787.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
258210787.transcript: Couldn't do it without you guys!

266884059.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
266884059.transcript: You impressed? Thought you might be.

270286496.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
270286496.transcript: Ooh, is that a competitive streak I detect?

280799136.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
280799136.transcript: Hope the next one's just as good.

284161269.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
284161269.transcript: I've heard of dancing on ice, but never dancing with ice.

284552984.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
284552984.transcript: What I would've given for a sister like you.

286792507.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
286792507.transcript: Ah, that's why they call you the Sword Sovereign.

294594155.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
294594155.transcript: Ready to kick it up a notch?

301816015.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
301816015.transcript: Such destructive power... gives me chills to be honest.

318928490.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
318928490.transcript: You can try, but I've got more where that came from.

321956169.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
321956169.transcript: We've had some intense fights in Zegagrande, but it's got its charms.

328625385.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
328625385.transcript: Funny coming from me, but your style's more rough-and-tumble than knightly.

335140690.label: PL2800_vo_ATK_ability_5_a_1
335140690.transcript: You made your bed! Now sleep in it!

347719367.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
347719367.transcript: Fiend? I don't know. I'm only a little devilish.

361731191.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
361731191.transcript: Gotta say, we are birds of a feather.

363453785.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
363453785.transcript: You're not getting your way, Lilith!

367299119.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
367299119.transcript: Who else wants their ass kicked?

375076947.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
375076947.transcript: That armor plating won't save you from my kicks!

376876960.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
376876960.transcript: Make sure to stay hydrated, everyone!

382141394.label: PL2800_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_2
382141394.transcript: There. I'm ready to go again.

387440079.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_enemy_break_C
387440079.transcript: Mind if we play a little rough?

392898744.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
392898744.transcript: Whoa, no way! You give me too much credit!

393041126.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
393041126.transcript: Hand to hand combat? Nah. Foot to face is more my style.

393671964.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
393671964.transcript: I don't care how tough you are. No shenanigans, okay?

396766317.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
396766317.transcript: Someone's in a hellfire and brimstone.

411395509.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
411395509.transcript: Rosetta, how do you balance all of that strength and beauty? It's amazing.

413269691.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
413269691.transcript: No kidding. Maybe I woke up on the right side of the bed this morning.

428419306.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
428419306.transcript: We take it down! No matter what!

436635317.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
436635317.transcript: Come on, just one? We were a pair of dolias!

440688916.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
440688916.transcript: Then we better pick it up!

449070841.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
449070841.transcript: With you as our captain, no one even compares.

456576076.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
456576076.transcript: We've got this in the bag!

457150828.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
457150828.transcript: Couldn't have done it without you and Ambrosk!

457850339.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
457850339.transcript: It looks like Furikin, but something's off.

470061212.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
470061212.transcript: It's fine. I'm not the type you need to worry about.

473670457.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
473670457.transcript: So, uh, you've got the devil on edge.

475191092.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
475191092.transcript: I've been through a lot to gain this strength. Though I've warmed up to it now.

481894817.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
481894817.transcript: That's not Id, but they have the same power.

500784765.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
500784765.transcript: Let's finish this once and for all!

508077123.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
508077123.transcript: Gonna kick its legs clean off!

508681814.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
508681814.transcript: I think we pissed him off.

511495565.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
511495565.transcript: We can't let a little climb stop us now!

525027853.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
525027853.transcript: I won't feel guilty about beating up a machine.

545811536.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
545811536.transcript: So, how do you swing that giant weapon?

550094503.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
550094503.transcript: Aww, look how teensy you are.

556451793.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
556451793.transcript: This thing is tough, but at least it's easy to predict.

565827867.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
565827867.transcript: Haven't even hit my stride yet.

566069236.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
566069236.transcript: Now I see what they mean by blinding speed.

567467935.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
567467935.transcript: Go out there and kick ass!

570349000.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
570349000.transcript: Took him down with one flash of the sword!

578413981.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
578413981.transcript: A little frost won't stop my hellfire!

582411783.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
582411783.transcript: Don't let up for a second!

583150871.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
583150871.transcript: You brought the speed, I brought the power. Simple perfection.

584032720.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
584032720.transcript: I don't know. I think we could've gone more hardcore.

589683178.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
589683178.transcript: We've beat it before! We can do it again!

589924922.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
589924922.transcript: Never met someone who could summon so much force with a single punch.

590297009.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
590297009.transcript: I hope we find the catalyst soon. For Lyria's sake.

597434411.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
597434411.transcript: Anyway, who's next on the kick list?

597695158.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
597695158.transcript: Fire away! I'll take your opening.

604290407.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
604290407.transcript: Aww, is it over already? That's no fun.

617687991.label: PL2800_vo_ATK_ability_5_a_2
617687991.transcript: Let's see how long you last!

619775556.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
619775556.transcript: Look at you go, Mr. Knight Captain!

624617109.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
624617109.transcript: You Eternals always get the job done.

628635322.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
628635322.transcript: No one beats me in a throwdown!

640757072.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
640757072.transcript: This chill makes my skin crawl.

644010568.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
644010568.transcript: Stay calm, stay focused. We'll knock it down.

644067055.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
644067055.transcript: Fighting's just kinda my thing. Doesn't matter the style.

647179895.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
647179895.transcript: Bet I could destroy you in a contest of strength.

651158951.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
651158951.transcript: And there's more where that came from!

671569646.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
671569646.transcript: Same. Feels like I learned a lot.

672461870.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
672461870.transcript: Whoa. So he's not all talk.

673073327.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
673073327.transcript: You mean so much kick, right?

677001599.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
677001599.transcript: Huh. Guess I owe you one.

677879431.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
677879431.transcript: You said it! Let's hit them hard and fast!

681352556.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
681352556.transcript: Alright! Too late to turn back now!

684580509.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
684580509.transcript: I've been hearing great things about your coffee.

693120601.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
693120601.transcript: You move like a squall, old timer. Teach me how to do that.

695602057.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
695602057.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

696135926.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
696135926.transcript: Well, you've already got dedication in spades.

699187271.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
699187271.transcript: Um, that's not really our whole deal.

700753848.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
700753848.transcript: Two fighters, but 100 times the ass-kicking!

703651388.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
703651388.transcript: No way to go but up!

703835862.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
703835862.transcript: You know, you guys could be using your powers for way better things.

718894268.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
718894268.transcript: No more games. This ends now!

721477535.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
721477535.transcript: Wow! You hit like a sledgehammer!

723935351.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
723935351.transcript: Trust me, I've got strength to spare.

723984213.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
723984213.transcript: Hang on, just a little longer, Lyria!

724944522.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
724944522.transcript: Okay, then I'll handle the rough stuff.

727044403.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_lockon_1
727044403.transcript: So, how should we do this?

736189068.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
736189068.transcript: No mercy, huh? Then I won't hold back either!

743867663.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
743867663.transcript: You know, Cagliostro, I bet you could rock a side pony.

744333797.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
744333797.transcript: Come on! The grind never stops!

744756071.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
744756071.transcript: Can't hold back now, can I?

760131207.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
760131207.transcript: I'll protect these skies! Watch me!

769245711.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
769245711.transcript: Its core is wide open! We just need to break it!

769357646.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
769357646.transcript: We sure set the heavens on fire, don't we?

770488001.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
770488001.transcript: The flower blooms upon the butterfly's call.

772323849.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
772323849.transcript: Let's not with the silly nicknames. People will get the wrong idea.

774957423.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
774957423.transcript: Sucks for them running into us!

778914378.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
778914378.transcript: I think I've got a read on it.

782455347.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
782455347.transcript: Don't go falling in love with me now!

793714980.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
793714980.transcript: Yeah. Ever since finding the Arkarium and becoming an Evoker.

794688787.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
794688787.transcript: In that case, may I have this dance, Your Highness?

798768316.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
798768316.transcript: Aw, thanks! Want a quick spritz after the fight?

799274868.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
799274868.transcript: What can I say? Fighting with this crew puts me in a good mood.

800335562.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
800335562.transcript: Should I take that as a compliment?

802435155.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
802435155.transcript: If this is you in your sixties, wonder what you could do at twenty.

803046795.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
803046795.transcript: A wind primal, huh? Whatever. This blowhard's going down.

805205705.label: PL2800_vo_ETC_comeback_1
805205705.transcript: Hah! I'm back in the fight!

807931707.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
807931707.transcript: You guys are the perfect pair!

817221398.label: PL2800_vo_ATK_ability_7_3
817221398.transcript: It's over when I say it is!

819318898.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
819318898.transcript: We make a good team, don't we?

823029114.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
823029114.transcript: You break their line, and I'll kick their asses!

823452453.label: PL2800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
823452453.transcript: Don't take your eyes off him!

826847293.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
826847293.transcript: So he was hiding his real powers all along?

852137891.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
852137891.transcript: Do I have the strength to protect these skies?

852158800.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
852158800.transcript: You can cut the formal stuff. We're allies.

854862172.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
854862172.transcript: Yeah, passion. It's what keeps me strong.

860426048.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
860426048.transcript: Mhm! We'll light their fire anytime!

863210313.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
863210313.transcript: Okay, Gallanza! To the stronger warrior!

870813293.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
870813293.transcript: Here comes the poetry! Watch out, bad guys!

886347830.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
886347830.transcript: I'll try not to let you down.

886975834.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
886975834.transcript: Nice! We've got her on the ropes!

890289342.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
890289342.transcript: Id, you're still in there, right?

899038109.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
899038109.transcript: I hope the monastery's not too far.

912034759.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
912034759.transcript: That goes for both of us!

912169695.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
912169695.transcript: Never noticed how much ass we kick together.

915420642.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
915420642.transcript: All these swords flying around. Be careful, guys!

921183495.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
921183495.transcript: You put the brute in brutal for sure!

927573167.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
927573167.transcript: Ugh. This place gives me the creeps.

933237252.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
933237252.transcript: Really? You wanna train together sometime?

935994487.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
935994487.transcript: Good work, Narmaya. Let's get ready for the next one.

937862718.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
937862718.transcript: That commitment will get you far, Lancelot.

941975429.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
941975429.transcript: And thorns of steel! I'm cool, I'm cool.

944964449.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
944964449.transcript: Super cute? Don't know if I'd call myself that.

945270354.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
945270354.transcript: And straight to the depths of hell!

945909283.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
945909283.transcript: You guys come to your senses yet?

953273211.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
953273211.transcript: Hey, just make sure you take care of him.

958145234.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
958145234.transcript: I'll drown the world in my splendor!

960294751.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
960294751.transcript: Not too bad yourself. Your swordsmanship is next level.

963831328.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
963831328.transcript: You really put it all on the line, don't you?

970947744.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
970947744.transcript: Clench your jaw, 'cause this is gonna hurt!

971612341.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
971612341.transcript: Play with fire and get burned!

977580677.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
977580677.transcript: Ooh, it's not every day I get to spar with a titan.

978115873.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
978115873.transcript: Worried over little ol' me? Thanks.

978320939.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
978320939.transcript: I guess we should thank you.

979701084.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
979701084.transcript: Right? Being together staves off the loneliness.

990998357.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
990998357.transcript: Oh, you haven't seen anything yet.

991917981.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
991917981.transcript: Come on, Frau! You can do this!

998786735.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
998786735.transcript: Feels great to go all out from time to time. Come on, let's bag the rest of 'em!

1017003625.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
1017003625.transcript: Come on! We can do this!

1018614844.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
1018614844.transcript: Huh. Your fire seems a little different from the devil's.

1030133503.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
1030133503.transcript: So that's how Evette gets things done.

1047308270.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
1047308270.transcript: So, Id. You know you give off a little brother vibe, right?

1053971564.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
1053971564.transcript: My job's a lot easier knowing you've got me covered.

1056479095.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
1056479095.transcript: Feel free to call me anytime, Mr. Fix-it!

1059928386.label: PL2800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
1059928386.transcript: I like the way you think. Let's go!

1060735469.label: PL2800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
1060735469.transcript: Nice footwork, guys! Keep it up!
